inputs.prompt: Project: The Beekeeper's Daughter — feature documentary about a young woman inheriting her late father's apiary and discovering his secret life as a conservation activist. Format: Feature doc, 80 min. Goal: €25,000. Platform: Kickstarter. Funds: Post-production. Audience: Environmental community, beekeeping enthusiasts, documentary lovers. Background: First-time director, short film won a regional award. Reward tiers: €5, €20, €50, €100.
Project: podcast about architecture. Format: 10-episode series. Goal: £8,000. Platform: Indiegogo. Funds: Recording and editing. Audience: design professionals.

Project: Harbour Voices — audio documentary capturing oral histories from ageing dock workers in Rotterdam, Gdansk, and Marseille before their stories are lost. Format: 6-episode podcast. Goal: €18,000. Platform: Kickstarter. Funds: Travel and recording across 3 countries. Audience: Maritime history community, European heritage enthusiasts. Background: Producer has made two award-winning radio documentaries for public radio.
